Off Calendar Dec-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
(Jeffrey S. Rosen, Esq. of the SHEPPARD LAW FIRM 296-0900, for the plaintiff and moving party Christopher Moffat, appeared after the hearing)
David S. Semel, Esq. of COLOMBATTO, KLIMENKO & ROSSE 391-6182, for defendant and opposing party
No appearance for plaintiff when the matter was called. Tentative ruling adopted -- PLAINTIFF Christopher Moffat's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION -- Deny, failure to shift burden under CCP 437c(f)(1) and 437c(o)(1). Plaintiff fails to present evidence re: damages. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (JJM/301/PB) Reporter: Joe Vickstein CSR # 4780
